name: TME — Miscellaneous Modifiers
description: Built-in miscellaneous modifiers. General-purpose effects that don't fit a specific category.

flavor.title: Muscle Memory
flavor.description: You can expend up to {amount} actions, bonus actions and spells and store them. On damage taken the oldest stored action is triggered and consumed
flavor.disclaimer: No reaction required. Parameters must be defined the moment you store the action

flavor.title: Vindicator
flavor.description: Upon being downed you can take {amount} action(s)
flavor.disclaimer: You can take multiple actions at once, your total amount of actions is pooled per long rest

activation.condition: upon being downed
upon being downed

flavor.title: Proactive
flavor.description: Your initiative is increased by {amount}

flavor.title: Swift
flavor.description: Your movement speed is increased by {amount}ft

flavor.title: All Time Ready
flavor.description: On saving throws, you can't roll below a {amount}

flavor.title: Lustrous
flavor.description: The item value is increased by 75

flavor.title: Finely Lustrous
flavor.description: The item value is increased by 125

flavor.title: Richly Lustrous
flavor.description: The item value is increased by 225

flavor.title: Opulently Lustrous
flavor.description: The item value is increased by 450

flavor.title: Precious
flavor.description: The item value is increased by 50%

flavor.title: Greatly Precious
flavor.description: The item value is doubled

flavor.title: Supremely Precious
flavor.description: The item value is quadrupled

flavor.title: Arcane Grip
flavor.description: As an action, this item can be used like a conjured mage hand (the hand replaced by this item). Additionally you can attack with it

flavor.title: Mithril
flavor.description: This item has no weight

flavor.title: Undying
flavor.description: You have advantage on death saving throws

flavor.title: Mocking
flavor.description: As an action, you can cast vicious mockery once per long rest

flavor.title: Count on It
flavor.description: Your counterspells cannot be counterspelled

flavor.title: Unaccountable
flavor.description: You cannot be counterspelled

flavor.title: Battle Mage
flavor.description: While you are concentrating on a spell, your melee attacks deal an additional {amount}d4 damage

activation.condition: while concentrating on a spell, on a melee hit
while concentrating on a spell, on a melee hit

flavor.title: Arcane Volatility
flavor.description: Upon casting a leveled spell, roll a d20. If 10 or lower, subtract a d4 from the spell level. If higher than 10, add a d4 to the spell level
flavor.disclaimer: Under or over leveled spells change according to their upcast description

activation.condition: upon casting a leveled spell
upon casting a leveled spell
upon casting a leveled spell

flavor.title: Find Snail
flavor.description: Once per long rest, as an action, summon a giant rideable snail to aid you. The snail has 2d10+4 HP and 30 ft movement speed
flavor.disclaimer: Works like 'Find Steed' with the stats of a warhorse

flavor.title: Find Greater Snail
flavor.description: Once per long rest, as an action, summon a giant rideable snail to aid you. The snail has 4d10+6 HP and 45 ft movement speed
flavor.disclaimer: Works like 'Find Steed' with the stats of a warhorse

flavor.title: Find Elder Snail
flavor.description: Once per long rest, as an action, summon a giant rideable snail to aid you. The snail has 6d10+8 HP and 60 ft movement speed
flavor.disclaimer: Works like 'Find Steed' with the stats of a warhorse

flavor.title: Healing Surge
flavor.description: Each healing instance you provide is forwarded to the nearest creature near the effect at 50% efficiency
flavor.disclaimer: Cannot affect the healed creature. Cannot affect the same creature twice. Does not chain

flavor.title: Chained Healing Surge
flavor.description: Each healing instance you provide is forwarded to the nearest creature near the effect at 50% efficiency
flavor.disclaimer: Cannot affect the healed creature. Cannot affect the same creature twice. Chains once with stacking efficiency loss

flavor.title: Cascading Healing Surge
flavor.description: Each healing instance you provide is forwarded to the nearest creature near the effect at 50% efficiency
flavor.disclaimer: Cannot affect the healed creature. Cannot affect the same creature twice. Chains twice with stacking efficiency loss

flavor.title: Heroism
flavor.description: You have advantage on saving throws vs. fear effects

flavor.title: Honk & Smite
flavor.description: As an action, retcon 1d4 goose into existence near you. You can have up to 2 goose at once. They will follow your screamed commands no matter the cost
flavor.disclaimer: You also get the ability to speak with goose

flavor.title: Greater Honk & Smite
flavor.description: As an action, retcon 1d4 goose into existence near you. You can have up to 4 goose at once. They will follow your screamed commands no matter the cost
flavor.disclaimer: You also get the ability to speak with goose

flavor.title: Supreme Honk & Smite
flavor.description: As an action, retcon 1d4 goose into existence near you. You can have up to 6 goose at once. They will follow your screamed commands no matter the cost
flavor.disclaimer: You also get the ability to speak with goose

flavor.title: Limit Break
flavor.description: You can reroll any of your damage dice. Take the initial damage of the rerolled dice before rerolling them
flavor.disclaimer: You must use the new roll, however you can reroll indefinitely

flavor.title: No Matter The Cost
flavor.description: As an action, with the help of a weapon or spell attack, execute a friendly creature below 12 HP. Forcefully motivate 1 creature of your choosing within 30ft to gain the effects of help
flavor.disclaimer: You cannot motivate yourself

flavor.title: No Matter The Cost.
flavor.description: As an action, with the help of a weapon or spell attack, execute a friendly creature below 12 HP. Forcefully motivate 2 creatures of your choosing within 30ft to gain the effects of help
flavor.disclaimer: You cannot motivate yourself

flavor.title: No Matter The Cost!
flavor.description: As an action, with the help of a weapon or spell attack, execute a friendly creature below 12 HP. Forcefully motivate 3 creatures of your choosing within 30ft to gain the effects of help
flavor.disclaimer: You cannot motivate yourself

flavor.title: Rapid
flavor.description: Your jump distance is increased by {amount}ft

flavor.title: Revenant
flavor.description: Once per long rest, as a bonus action, you can shadow step from one area of dim light or darkness to another within 60 feet

flavor.title: Hidden Depths
flavor.description: Gain a bonus to Investigation and Insight checks that increases the lower your current HP is, each 10% missing HP grant you +1

flavor.title: Reluctant Savior
flavor.description: Whenever you heal another creature, gain temporary HP equal to the amount healed
flavor.disclaimer: Temporary HP do not stack, only the highest value applies

flavor.title: First One In
flavor.description: You have advantage on attack rolls on your first turn of combat

flavor.title: Reckless Abandon
flavor.description: Your reckless attacks deal bonus damage equal to your Strength modifier

flavor.title: Absolute Unit
flavor.description: You have advantage on Strength checks involving brute force

flavor.title: Mark of Death
flavor.description: Each successful attack against a creature grants you a permanent +{amount} bonus to damage against it, stacking indefinitely

flavor.title: Aura of Blood
flavor.description: At the start of your turn, each hostile within 10ft takes {amount} necrotic damage

activation.condition: at the start of your turn
at the start of your turn

flavor.title: Shieldhook
flavor.description: You can attach a shield to this armor. Any actions requiring two hands or the use of the hand nearest to the attached shield are done with disadvantage

flavor.title: Dark Devotion
flavor.description: Gain a bonus to Stealth and Deception checks equal to your Wisdom modifier

flavor.title: Resolute
flavor.description: Gain a +{amount} bonus to Concentration saving throws

flavor.title: Accelerant
flavor.description: On your first turn of each combat, your movement speed is increased by 10ft

flavor.title: Iron Will
flavor.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened or charmed

flavor.title: Perceptive
flavor.description: Gain a +{amount} bonus to Perception checks

flavor.title: Night Owl
flavor.description: Gain darkvision out to {amount}ft, or extend existing darkvision by {amount}ft

flavor.title: Bloodhound
flavor.description: You can sense the presence of bleeding creatures within 30ft

flavor.title: Adrenaline
flavor.description: The first time you take damage in combat, regain {amount}d4 HP

activation.condition: first time taking damage in combat
first time taking damage in combat

flavor.title: Hardened
flavor.description: Reduce one instance of non-magical damage by {amount}, 3 times per long rest

activation.condition: when taking non-magical damage
when taking non-magical damage

flavor.title: Mystic Reach
flavor.description: Your spellcasting range is increased by {amount}ft

flavor.title: Structural Disintegry
flavor.description: Your attacks deal double damage to objects, structures, and non living constructs.

flavor.title: Structural Disintegry
flavor.description: Your attacks deal quadruple damage to objects, structures, and non living constructs.

flavor.title: Structural Disintegry
flavor.description: Your attacks deal octuple damage to objects, structures, and non living constructs.

flavor.title: Reality Anchor
flavor.description: You are immune to forced movement. Twice per long rest, as a reaction, end one magical effect currently affecting you
flavor.disclaimer: Forced movement includes pushes, pulls, and teleportation against your will

activation.condition: when affected by a magical effect
when affected by a magical effect

flavor.title: Untethered
flavor.description: You can move through creature spaces and end your turn occupying the same space as another creature

flavor.title: Magic Spillover
flavor.description: When you receive healing while at full HP, convert the excess into up to 8 temporary HP
flavor.disclaimer: Temporary HP do not stack, only the highest applies

flavor.title: Greater Magic Spillover
flavor.description: When you receive healing while at full HP, convert the excess into up to 16 temporary HP
flavor.disclaimer: Temporary HP do not stack, only the highest applies

flavor.title: Supreme Magic Spillover
flavor.description: When you receive healing while at full HP, convert the excess into up to 32 temporary HP
flavor.disclaimer: Temporary HP do not stack, only the highest applies

flavor.title: Flagellant
flavor.description: While concentrating on a spell, reduce the damage you take each turn by {amount}

flavor.title: Condemned
flavor.description: Readied attacks deal {amount}d6 additional damage

activation.condition: on a readied attack or spell attack
on a readied attack or spell attack

flavor.title: The Finals
flavor.description: Gain +1 to melee attack and damage rolls as well as spell attack and damage rolls for each ally that outnumbers your hostiles
flavor.disclaimer: Bonus equals the number by which allies exceed hostiles. Minimum 0

flavor.title: Directed Healing
flavor.description: As a reaction when an ally heals you with a spell, gain {amount} additional HP

activation.condition: when healed by an ally's spell
when healed by an ally's spell

flavor.title: Graceful Descent
flavor.description: Reduce any falling damage you take by {amount}d6

activation.condition: when taking falling damage
when taking falling damage

flavor.title: Breakaway
flavor.description: When you take the Dash action, you move an additional {amount}ft

flavor.title: Enlightened
flavor.description: Reduce any magic damage you take by {amount}
flavor.disclaimer: Magic isn't real you Idiot

flavor.title: Deep Pockets
flavor.description: Your carrying capacity is doubled

flavor.title: Deeper Pockets
flavor.description: Your carrying capacity is tripled

flavor.title: Deepest Pockets
flavor.description: Your carrying capacity is quadrupled

flavor.title: Revisionary
flavor.description: Gain a +12 bonus to History checks, but everything you recall is something you just made up
flavor.disclaimer: Delivered with unwavering confidence

feats.title: Revisionary
feats.description: Everything you recall in a history check is something you just made up

flavor.title: Malpractice Professional
flavor.description: Gain a +12 bonus to Medicine checks. You can have no clue about humanoid anatomy

feats.title: Malpractice Professional
feats.description: You can have no clue about humanoid anatomy

flavor.title: Pristine
flavor.description: This item cannot be broken by normal wear and always looks pristine

flavor.title: Power Nap
flavor.description: When you spend hit dice during a short rest, each die restores {amount} additional HP

flavor.title: Sentry
flavor.description: If you haven't moved this turn, your first attack roll gains +{amount} to hit

flavor.title: Second Chance
flavor.description: {amount} time(s) per long rest, when you roll a 1 on a d20, you can reroll it
flavor.disclaimer: You must use the new roll

activation.condition: when you roll a 1 on a d20 test
when you roll a 1 on a d20 test

flavor.title: Long Shot
flavor.description: Any spell you cast with a range of 120ft or more is treated as having an infinite range
flavor.disclaimer: Please don't place a portal on the moon

flavor.title: Blast Radius
flavor.description: Increases the radius of your spells by +{amount}ft
flavor.disclaimer: Includes spheres, cones, lines etc, not the range itself

flavor.title: Fireballing
flavor.description: Fuck it, we ball. Each fireball you cast is automatically upcast by {amount} level(s)
flavor.disclaimer: Collateral damage is a 'future you' problem

flavor.title: Pyromaniac
flavor.description: Fire damage you caused deals double damage to objects and structures

flavor.title: Pyromaniac
flavor.description: Fire damage you caused deals triple damage to objects and structures

flavor.title: Pyromaniac
flavor.description: Fire damage you caused deals quadruple damage to objects and structures
